name: Scarlet Witch
description: Wanda Maximoff was experimented on by HYDRA using the Mind Stone, unlocking her innate potential for chaos magic, a power so vast it can rewrite reality itself. Originally motivated by vengeance against Stark, she evolved into an Avenger, fell in love with Vision, and ultimately became the Scarlet Witch after studying the Darkhold. Her grief-driven creation of a pocket reality in Westview demonstrates both the terrifying scope of her abilities and the devastating cost of unchecked power.
